message:
add hook lifecycle events and plugin event formatting

Add EventHookStart/EventHookEnd event types with HookStartData/HookEndData
payloads for observability when hooks fire. Add MCPCount to PluginLoadedData.
Wire event callback from HookRunner into Session.emit via SetEventCallback.
Format PLUGIN_LOADED, HOOK_START, and HOOK_END in human-readable event drain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,6 +30,8 @@ const (
 	EventSubagentStart       EventKind = "SUBAGENT_START"
 	EventSubagentEnd         EventKind = "SUBAGENT_END"
 	EventPluginLoaded        EventKind = "PLUGIN_LOADED"
+	EventHookStart           EventKind = "HOOK_START"
+	EventHookEnd             EventKind = "HOOK_END"
 )
 
 type SessionEvent struct {
@@ -202,4 +204,21 @@ type PluginLoadedData struct {
 	Dir        string `json:"dir"`
 	SkillCount int    `json:"skill_count"`
 	AgentCount int    `json:"agent_count"`
+	MCPCount   int    `json:"mcp_count"`
+}
+
+type HookStartData struct {
+	Event      string `json:"event"`
+	HookType   string `json:"hook_type"`
+	Matcher    string `json:"matcher"`
+	PluginName string `json:"plugin_name"`
+}
+
+type HookEndData struct {
+	Event      string `json:"event"`
+	HookType   string `json:"hook_type"`
+	Matcher    string `json:"matcher"`
+	PluginName string `json:"plugin_name"`
+	ExitCode   int    `json:"exit_code"`
+	DurationMS int64  `json:"duration_ms"`
 }
